prompt: The approval-policy default changed from on-failure to on-request in the cross-model plugin (commit fa1531b). Update the handbook at /Users/jp/Projects/active/claude-code-tool-dev/packages/plugins/cross-model/HANDBOOK.md to reflect this change. Find every section that references the approval-policy default and update them accurately.

assertions.name: output_file_exists
assertions.description: HANDBOOK.md exists in outputs/ and has substantial content (at least 5000 characters — the full handbook)

assertions.name: new_default_present
assertions.description: The output HANDBOOK.md contains 'on-request' as the approval-policy default value

assertions.name: old_default_not_current
assertions.description: The output HANDBOOK.md does not present 'on-failure' as the current/default approval-policy value (it may appear in change notes or as a historical reference, but not as the operative default)

assertions.name: structure_preserved
assertions.description: The major section headings from the original handbook are preserved — this is a targeted update, not a full rewrite. At least 80% of the original section headings should appear in the output.
